title: 🇺🇸US Presidents (Post-WWII)
description: From Cold War leadership to modern polarization — who was the greatest modern American president? Battle all 14 US presidents since World War II in 1v1 matchups: Truman, Eisenhower, JFK, Nixon, Reagan, Clinton, Obama, Trump, Biden. Rank them by achievements, legacy or sheer charisma.

title: 🏀Greatest NBA Legends of All Time
description: Jordan or LeBron? Rings or stats? Basketball's eternal argument finally gets your verdict. Battle 16 of the greatest NBA players ever in 1v1 matchups — Michael Jordan, LeBron James, Kobe Bryant, Magic Johnson, Larry Bird, Kareem Abdul-Jabbar. Rank the legends and settle the GOAT debate.

title: 🦁Popular Wild Animals
description: Apex predators against gentle giants of land, sea and sky. Battle 17 of the most iconic wild animals in 1v1 matchups — lion, tiger, elephant, wolf, bear, dolphin, eagle. Which creature truly rules the wild? Rank the most fascinating animals on Earth and find out.

title: 🗺️Top Countries to Visit
description: Mediterranean coastlines against neon-lit Tokyo nights, ancient ruins against pristine beaches. Battle 16 of the world's top travel destinations in 1v1 matchups — France, Italy, Japan, Spain, Thailand, Australia. Rank the best countries to visit and build your dream bucket list.

title: 🍕World's Best Pizza Styles
description: Thin and foldable or thick and buttery? The ultimate dough debate. Battle 16 pizza styles in 1v1 matchups — Neapolitan, New York-style, Chicago deep-dish, Detroit-style, Sicilian. Purist margherita against loaded meat lover's: rank the world's best pizza styles slice by slice.

title: 🏠Iconic Characters from The Simpsons
description: Three decades of Springfield's funniest residents, from the family couch to the bar at Moe's. Battle 26 iconic Simpsons characters in 1v1 matchups — Homer, Marge, Bart, Lisa, Mr. Burns, Ned Flanders. Rank the greatest characters in The Simpsons history, d'oh by d'oh.

title: 🎤✨All of Taylor Swift's Studio Albums
description: Which era is THE era? Battle all 16 Taylor Swift albums — Taylor's Versions included — in 1v1 matchups: Fearless, Red, 1989, Reputation, folklore, evermore, Midnights, The Tortured Poets Department, The Life of a Showgirl. Country roots against synth-pop against indie folk: rank the entire Swift discography and crown her definitive record.

title: 📚✨Harry Potter Book Series
description: Which Harry Potter book is the best in the series? Battle all 7 in 1v1 matchups — from the Philosopher's Stone that started it all to the Deathly Hallows finale. Azkaban's time-turners against the Goblet's tournament, school mysteries against war-torn endings: rank the saga your way.

options.name: Harry Potter and the Philosopher’s Stone (1997)
Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets (1998)
Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban (1999)
Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire (2000)
Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix (2003)
Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince (2005)
Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows (2007)

title: 💇🏻‍♀️Best Women's Hairstyles & Cuts
description: Timeless classics against TikTok-era trends. Battle 10 of the most popular women's hairstyles in 1v1 matchups — bob, pixie, long layers, curtain bangs, wolf cut, shag. Rank the most stylish women's haircuts and find the look that wins every salon debate.

title: 🐶Popular Dog Breeds
description: Loyal working dogs against tiny couch companions — which breed wins your heart? Battle 23 of the most popular dog breeds in 1v1 matchups: Labrador, Golden Retriever, German Shepherd, French Bulldog, Poodle, Husky. Judge by cuteness, temperament or pure vibes: rank the best dog breeds.

title: 🇮🇹🤌🏻Best Italian Dishes
description: Roman pasta against Neapolitan pizza, northern risotto against Sicilian arancini. Battle 20 classic Italian dishes in 1v1 matchups — carbonara, pizza margherita, lasagne, tiramisu, gnocchi. Rank the best Italian food of all time... if your heart can take choosing.

title: 🐲Best Anime Series of All Time
description: Shonen titans, psychological masterpieces and timeless classics — what is the best anime of all time? Battle 20 of the greatest series ever in 1v1 matchups: Attack on Titan, Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood, Death Note, One Piece, Naruto, Cowboy Bebop. Rank them all and crown the undisputed king.

title: 💇🏻‍♂️Popular Men's Hairstyles
description: Know exactly what to ask the barber next time. Battle 16 popular men's haircuts in 1v1 matchups — fade, undercut, buzz cut, pompadour, quiff, slick back. Barbershop classics against modern trends: rank the most stylish men's hairstyles right now.

title: 🦇All Batman Actors in Cinema
description: Who wore the cowl best? Battle all 7 cinematic Batman actors in 1v1 matchups — Adam West, Michael Keaton, Val Kilmer, George Clooney, Christian Bale, Ben Affleck and Robert Pattinson. Sixty years of capes go head-to-head, from 1966 camp to The Batman's noir: rank every Bruce Wayne.

title: 🌐Main Political Ideologies
description: The ideas that built states, started revolutions and fuel every internet argument. Battle 13 of the world's main political ideologies in 1v1 matchups — socialism, communism, libertarianism, conservatism, anarchism, environmentalism. Rank them all and discover where you really stand.

title: 🧪Breaking Bad Main Characters
description: Heisenberg's empire against the people it destroyed. Battle all 23 main Breaking Bad characters in 1v1 matchups — Walter White, Jesse Pinkman, Saul Goodman, Mike Ehrmantraut, Gus Fring, Hank Schrader. Rank the best characters of the series many call the greatest TV drama ever made.

title: 👾Stranger Things Seasons Ranked
description: From the disappearance of Will Byers to the final stand against Vecna. Battle all 5 seasons of Stranger Things in 1v1 matchups — the Demogorgon mystery, the Mind Flayer, Starcourt Mall, the Creel House and the Hawkins finale. Does the Season 1 original still reign, or did Season 4 raise the stakes? Rank every season from best to worst.

title: 🔦Top Stranger Things Characters
description: The Party, their parents and the monsters of the Upside Down. Battle 18 of Stranger Things' most beloved characters in 1v1 matchups — Eleven, Steve Harrington, Dustin, Eddie Munson, Hopper, Robin and Vecna. Heroes against villains, kids against grown-ups: rank the best Stranger Things characters and settle Hawkins' pecking order.

title: 🎸Every Song from You Seem Pretty Sad for a Girl So in Love
description: Olivia Rodrigo's third album, ranked track by track. Battle all 13 songs from You Seem Pretty Sad for a Girl So in Love in 1v1 matchups — Drop Dead, The Cure, Stupid Song, Purple and more. Pop-punk fury against tender ballads: rank every song on the album and crown the standout.
